nasb.text: what we have seen and heard we proclaim to you also, so that you too may have fellowship with us; and indeed our fellowship is with the Father, and with His Son Jesus Christ.

esv.text: that which we have seen and heard we proclaim also to you, so that you too may have fellowship with us; and indeed our fellowship is with the Father and with his Son Jesus Christ.

cnv.text: 我們把所看見所聽見的向你們宣揚，使你們也可以和我們彼此相通。我們是與父和他的兒子耶穌基督彼此相通的。

ccb.text: 我们把所见所闻传给你们，使你们可以与我们相交。诚然，我们是与父和祂儿子耶稣基督相交。

csbs.text: 我们把所看到、 所听到的也向你们宣扬， 好使你们也能够与我们相契合； 而我们又是与父 和他的儿子耶稣基督相契合的。
